programmes.statusNote: The current official 2026 admissions page states a 30-credit graduation requirement but enumerates only five Core Courses (15 credits) and three Electives (9 credits). Its 'up to two 3-credit-unit free electives' option is explicitly part of the three-Elective list, so it does not identify the remaining 6-credit requirement. Keep the structure closed until CityUHK publishes a complete 30-credit rule or confirms the missing component.

The current CityUHK page fully enumerates the 30-credit first-year Chinese History curriculum and links the official Peking University curriculum updated on 30 September 2025 for the 15-credit second year of the Chinese History and Cultural Heritage Stream. The three-page PKU document publishes required and elective course names with 1.5-credit values but no official course codes. Codes cannot be invented, so the 45-credit Stream and therefore the full Programme remain source-blocked.
